scripts.build: vite build && copy maradona.png dist\ & copy logo.png dist\ & copy 4.jpg dist\ & copy manifest.json dist\ & copy sw.js dist\ & copy streams.json dist\ & copy matches.json dist\ & copy channels.json dist\ & copy extract.html dist\ & copy 404.html dist\ & if not exist dist\icons mkdir dist\icons & copy icons\* dist\icons\
